value.effect: Choose 1 of up to 3 Playing cards to add to your deck
This Joker gains X0.25 Mult every time a playing card is added to your deck (Currently X1 Mult)
When round begins, add a random playing card with a random seal to your hand
(lvl.1) Level up Straight Flush +4 Mult and +40 chips
Earn $4 if poker hand is a Flush, poker hand changes at end of round
